notes: Researched 2026-07-17 as part of Wave 13 (post-Wave-12 fresh research pass). Thin Arabic competition confirmed: no dedicated Arabic countdown/hub page found for this query, only official tourism content and news-cycle coverage. Real differentiator is the countdown mechanic plus the explicit Riyadh-Season disambiguation, which nobody else addresses.
